title: Merge the FIRRTL HierPathOp with HW GlobalRefOp
body:
The functionality of `GlobalRefOp` and `HierPathOp` share a same logic to represent a NLA path.
However `GlobalRefOp` doesn't provide enough utilities to developer.
This PR decouple `HierPathOp` to FIRRTL Dialect by adding a new interface: `HierarchicalPathLike`, making those two ops share a same Interface, thus providing more utilities to `GlobalRefOp`
